title: Savory Velvety Vietnamese Banana Stir-fry
description: A show-off Vietnamese dish featuring bananas in a velvety sauce that is both savory and high-protein-friendly.

ingredients.name: Bananas
ingredients.notes: Use ripe bananas for best flavor.

ingredients.name: Vegetable Broth
ingredients.notes: Opt for low-sodium variety if available.

ingredients.name: Fish Sauce
ingredients.notes: Optional, can be omitted for reduced salt intake.

ingredients.name: Fresh Peppercorns
ingredients.notes: Whole or ground, depending on preference.

instructions: Preheat your wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Slice the bananas into thin rounds and finely chop the garlic cloves. Peel and roughly chop the green onions.
In a small bowl, mix Fish Sauce with Soy Sauce and set aside.
Add oil to your heated wok or skillet and when hot, add sliced bananas along with green onions.
Toss for about 1 minute until they start to soften. Add chopped garlic, turmeric powder, and salt into the pan.
Pour in the prepared Fish-Soy Sauce mixture and stir well until everything is evenly coated and fragrant.
Finally, sprinkle fresh peppercorns over the top of your banana stir-fry and continue to cook for another minute to infuse the flavor further.
Serve immediately while hot. Enjoy this high-protein-friendly Vietnamese dish as a side or main course!
